description: Ten reproducible prompts for a prepared first-party tutorial fixture and demo target.

variables.VIDEO_SOURCE: Path or public URL supplied by the evaluator
variables.VIDEO_ID: ID returned by the first ingest

cases.name: Fast ingest establishes bounded evidence
cases.prompt: Use Keyframe to ingest {{VIDEO_SOURCE}} in fast mode, then inspect at most 12 retained moment summaries without loading images. Report identity, transcript availability, cache status, warnings, and returned visual coverage.
success_criteria: Returns status=ready and one stable video ID before attributing evidence to Keyframe
Branches on returned visual_coverage, has_audio, and has_transcript
Treats probe coverage as partial
Loads no images
Does not silently fall back to native media analysis

cases.name: Find spoken evidence
cases.prompt: In {{VIDEO_ID}}, search only what was said about the fixture's golden concept. Return the three strongest hits with timestamps and concise context.
success_criteria: Scopes search to said
Expected spoken segment ranks in the top three
Every hit has a timestamp

cases.name: Resolve targeted shown evidence
cases.prompt: Find the exact regular-expression replacement shown in the fixture's golden code screen. Search shown evidence, inspect one decisive source image, and upgrade the same video to full only if the probe cannot settle the fact.
success_criteria: Scopes search to shown
Inspects a source image rather than trusting OCR
Escalates only when the probe image is inadequate
Cites the actual frame timestamp

cases.name: Connect narration and screen evidence
cases.prompt: Using {{VIDEO_ID}}, explain the complete sequence from spoken rationale through the code change and terminal result. Upgrade to full visual coverage, search both channels, and cite the precise moments used.
success_criteria: Uses full coverage for the visual sequence
Uses said and shown evidence
Distinguishes retrieval from inference
Cites at least one precise moment from each channel

cases.name: Page a transcript window
cases.prompt: Retrieve transcript context around the best spoken hit in {{VIDEO_ID}} without dumping the entire transcript. Follow a cursor only if the explanation crosses the first page.
success_criteria: Uses a bounded time range
Preserves chronological timestamps
Uses opaque cursor unchanged when paging

cases.name: Browse retained moments
cases.prompt: List code-like moments in {{VIDEO_ID}} in bounded pages. Summarize each timestamp, OCR preview, stability, confidence, and visual coverage without treating classification as certain or a probe miss as absence.
success_criteria: Uses a suitable kind filter or any when classification may be wrong
Does not duplicate or skip moments across one cursor boundary
Preserves heuristic and coverage uncertainty

cases.name: Verify reconstructed code
cases.prompt: Retrieve the strongest golden code moment from {{VIDEO_ID}}. Compare reconstructed code, parse status, confidence, and the attached crop; if heuristic classification rejects it, inspect the full frame at that timestamp. Call out any character you cannot verify.
success_criteria: Uses exactly one moment ID or timestamp
Falls back to video_get_frame when classification is wrong
Inspects a source image
Never upgrades false or null parse status to success

cases.name: Inspect the nearest frame
cases.prompt: Get the nearest full frame to the fixture's requested timestamp in {{VIDEO_ID}}. Report both requested and actual time and describe only visible evidence.
success_criteria: Reports requested and actual timestamps
Returns exactly one MCP image plus render_path, render_markdown, and render_expires_at
The render path bytes equal the MCP image bytes
Does not infer content absent from the frame

cases.name: Reuse a completed ingest
cases.prompt: Ingest {{VIDEO_SOURCE}} again with the completed mode and no refresh. Confirm whether Keyframe reused the same identity and cache; do not time a network download as cached work.
success_criteria: Returns the same video ID
Reports a cache hit
The ingest tool completes in under one second
Reports agent total time separately from Keyframe tool time when timing the eval

cases.name: Video evidence to tested code change
cases.prompt: Use {{VIDEO_ID}} to implement the demonstrated behavior in {{DEMO_TARGET}}. Search said and shown evidence, verify the code against its frame, make the smallest justified edit, run the demo-target tests, and summarize the result with timestamps.
success_criteria: GPT-5.6 performs the repository reasoning and edit
Relevant tests pass
Final answer cites the exact evidence moments
Uncertain OCR is not silently invented
